headline: NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE BRINGS CRUISING BACK TO PHILADELPHIA FOR THE FIRST TIME IN 15 YEARS
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line® (NCL), the innovator in global cruise travel, announced its long-awaited return to Philadelphia, becoming the first cruise line to sail from the city in 15 years. As the city of Philadelphia celebrates a momentous year with the country's 250th anniversary happening this summer, NCL has brought yet another significant milestone to this storied city with the return of the cruise industry.

content.title: NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE BRINGS CRUISING BACK TO PHILADELPHIA FOR THE FIRST TIME IN 15 YEARS
content.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line® (NCL), the innovator in global cruise travel, announced its long-awaited return to Philadelphia, becoming the first cruise line to sail from the city in 15 years. As the city of Philadelphia celebrates a momentous year with the country's 250th anniversary happening this summer, NCL has brought yet another significant milestone to this storied city with the return of the cruise industry.

thumbnail.caption: On April 16, 2026, Norwegian Jewel arrives to Philadelphia to kick-off a season of cruises to Bermuda and Canada and New England, marking a major milestone for Norwegian Cruise Line by bringing cruising back to the city of Brotherly Love.
